---
title: "Case Management NI"
---

::: {.hero-section}

# Independent Case Management Across Northern Ireland

Professional, person-centred support following serious injury, illness, and complex rehabilitation needs.

[Contact Us](contact.qmd){.button-link}

:::

## How We Help

::: {.service-card}
### Rehabilitation Coordination

We help coordinate therapy, care, equipment, community services, and ongoing support.
:::

::: {.service-card}
### Case Management

We work with clients, families, solicitors, insurers, and healthcare professionals to keep plans clear, joined-up, and realistic.
:::

::: {.service-card}
### Person-Centred Support

Every plan is shaped around the person, their goals, their family, and their everyday life.
:::

::: {.highlight-box}
## Our Approach

Clear communication, practical planning, and compassionate support are at the centre of everything we do.
:::

## Current Industry Partners

::: {.partner-banner}
<div class="partner-track">

<span>Brain Injury Matters</span>

<span>Rehab Without Walls</span>

<span>NI Community Support Network</span>

<span>Independent Occupational Therapy Services</span>

<span>Case Management Society UK</span>

<span>Community Rehabilitation Providers</span>

<span>Brain Injury Matters</span>

<span>Rehab Without Walls</span>

<span>NI Community Support Network</span>

<span>Independent Occupational Therapy Services</span>

</div>
:::

<a href="contact.html" class="floating-contact">
Contact Us
</a>

## Our Focus

::: {.stats-grid}

<div class="stat-card">
<h2>Person-Centred</h2>
<p>Support tailored to individual goals and everyday life.</p>
</div>

<div class="stat-card">
<h2>Collaborative</h2>
<p>Working alongside families and professionals.</p>
</div>

<div class="stat-card">
<h2>Independent</h2>
<p>Clear, practical, evidence-informed coordination.</p>
</div>

:::

## What People Say

::: {.testimonial-carousel}
<div class="testimonial-track">

<div class="testimonial-card">
<p>“Professional, compassionate, and highly organised support throughout rehabilitation.”</p>
<strong>Family member</strong>
</div>

<div class="testimonial-card">
<p>“Clear communication and practical coordination made a complex situation much easier to manage.”</p>
<strong>Solicitor</strong>
</div>

<div class="testimonial-card">
<p>“The support felt calm, consistent, and genuinely person-centred.”</p>
<strong>Client feedback</strong>
</div>

<div class="testimonial-card">
<p>“Reliable, thoughtful, and focused on meaningful outcomes.”</p>
<strong>Healthcare professional</strong>
</div>

</div>
:::
